creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #7)
Hi,

$ host git.freebsd.org | grep IPv6
gitmir.geo.freebsd.org has IPv6 address 2a02:80:0:3ffd::24ca:1
gitmir.geo.freebsd.org has IPv6 address 2604:1380:4091:a001::24ca:1
$ 

Both have mss of 8940.

2604:1380:4091:a001::24ca:1 works
2a02:80:0:3ffd::24ca:1 doesn't

it appears that it's only gitmir.sjb.freebsd.org which has the problem
